case_title: JAMES DARANG MORALES VS. SFRIP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA MEDICI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORALES, JAMES DARANG AS TO DEFENDANT SFRIP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA MEDICI RESTAURANT & LOUNGE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
